title: Player Health Bar
description: Simple Player Health Bar For Vanilla
body:
# Player Health Bar
This datapack is a simple health display system that uses the scoreboard “display below name”

![hit player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1742a5c5e1586e9cfb3e8a9d96d449e6fb105dd6.gif)

# Features
### - Display all effect icons
![effect bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/231998a7937333d4c1a3c085e83953fac371610d.png)

### - Health bar colors that match the player's active effects
![poison bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d956a2000633253c6225358f7ee504fd6d3cb24a.png)![frozen bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfede7d0c21b82ef2941a01d30b46f7eeef24277.png)![wither bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8412146fd70d13d7b250b195add18323cafece6f.png)![absorption](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b82465d01406cd4df580de351d9b9b66fa33206.png)

### - A system that detects and fully supports the player's maximum health
![healthbar1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ca095ccc6604a12c975327173765a217785a687.png)
![healthbar2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0af02659aea5d86c51391c518ed70e69e143df7.png)

# Settings

### /scoreboard players set #is_effect_visible phb.setting 0
Turn off display effect icon

### /data modify storage phb:config bar_string set value 'A'
Change bar string

If you want to reset it, run "/data remove storage phb:config bar_string" and then "/reload"
![a bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7208c78729708f703ec637c83989e2d84781a7a0.png)
